cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24.0 FATAL_ERROR)

project(LibreMac
    VERSION 0.1.0
    DESCRIPTION "macOS-native integration for LibreSCRS"
    LANGUAGES CXX OBJCXX
)

list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake")

include(LibreMacOptions)
include(FetchLibreMiddleware)

add_subdirectory(BridgeNative)

# BridgeNative is a STATIC archive that the Xcode project links into the
# host target. The Xcode project is generated by XcodeGen (project.yml);
# this CMake side does not produce the .app bundle.
